rationale: Matched recommended stack for seo-fullstack-web with SEO requirement
Selected nextjs for frontend with nextjs-route-handlers backend.
Blender MCP requested for cinematic hero render; volumetric fog and reflections require visual iteration.
Vision capability required for composition balance and text overlay space verification.
Quality latency preference supports multiple lighting iterations for cinematic effect.
16:9 composition constraint requires viewport framing validation.
